sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kroger Just Broke Its Own Promise. It’s a Lesson in What Not to Do
feed.summary: Kroger announced in 2018 it would eliminate single-use plastic bags by the end of 2025 as part of its "Zero Hunger Zero Waste" initiative. However, the company quietly scaled back this commitment in March, stating it would only reduce plastic bag consumption over time while preserving customer convenience and affordability. This backtrack has led to negative headlines and accusations of greenwashing, raising questions about the company's commitment beyond profit.

feed.title: TSMC, Lam Research, Applied Materials, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and More Movers
feed.summary: Stock futures showed a rebound on Thursday, following President Donald Trump's remarks that seemed to de-escalate the likelihood of U.S. military action in Iran. This article highlights key movers in the market, including TSMC, Lam Research, Applied Materials, Goldman Sachs, and Morgan Stanley. This rebound suggests a positive market reaction to reduced geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Some Shareholders Feeling Restless Over Allegion plc's (NYSE:ALLE) P/E Ratio
feed.summary: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) currently has a high P/E ratio of 21.7x, which is above the U.S. market average. While the company has shown strong earnings growth in the past, analyst forecasts suggest future growth will only be comparable to the broader market. This raises concerns that investors might be paying a premium for Allegion shares given its average growth outlook, potentially leading to disappointment if the P/E ratio adjusts.

feed.title: Gartner: Worldwide AI Spending Seen at $2.52 Trillion In 2026
feed.summary: Gartner projects global AI spending to reach $2.52 trillion in 2026, driven primarily by AI infrastructure growth. This significant increase reflects enterprises' focus on achieving measurable returns on investment and scalable AI adoption. Organizations are prioritizing proven outcomes over speculative projects, with incumbent software providers leading AI sales rather than new ventures.

feed.title: FIS Rating Reinstated as Hold by Deutsche Bank with $70 PT | FIS Stock News

feed.title: UBS downgrades GE HealthCare to “sell” on valuation, competitive risks By Investing.com
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded GE HealthCare to a "sell" rating from "neutral" despite raising its price target to $77 from $73. The downgrade is attributed to the stock's current trading price ($84.77) being above the revised target, suggesting that best-case execution for tariff mitigation and new product launches is already factored into the share price. UBS also cited competitive risks and investor expectations being ahead of sell-side forecasts, leading to downside risk for earnings.

feed.title: Nio Firefly launches new limited-edition Firefly EV, capped at 99 units
feed.summary: Nio's compact EV brand, Firefly, has launched a new limited-edition Firefly EV in China, co-designed with Dutch artist Jordy van den Nieuwendijk. Only 99 units will be sold, priced 20% higher than the regular model at RMB 95,800 under the BaaS plan. This release marks another limited edition for Firefly, contributing to brand awareness and coinciding with the Chinese Year of the Horse.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper launches offer for JDE Peet’s at a price of EUR 31.85 in cash per share
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has launched a public cash offer to acquire all issued and outstanding ordinary shares of JDE Peet’s at EUR 31.85 per share. Following the acquisition, KDP plans to separate into two independent, U.S.-listed public companies: a North American refreshment beverages firm and a global coffee leader, serving over 100 countries. The offer has been approved by the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets, and JDE Peet's board unanimously recommends it to shareholders.

feed.title: PureCycle (PCT) Soars 10.3% on Football Playoff Exposure
feed.summary: PureCycle Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PCT) saw its stock jump by 10.30% after announcing its participation in the College Football Playoff National Championship. The company is collaborating with Churchill Container and 4ocean to launch a sustainability initiative at the event, offering souvenir cups made from recycled plastic. This aims to reduce plastic waste and increase environmental awareness at major sporting events.

feed.title: Apple and Tech Hardware Stocks Face ‘Crisis’ as Memory Prices Soar
feed.summary: Soaring memory and storage component prices are creating a crisis for hardware companies like Apple and HP Inc. While memory manufacturers like Sandisk, Micron, and Western Digital have seen significant stock gains, their customers face pressure due to the rising cost of these essential components, a situation not expected to reverse soon. Apple's stock performance in 2025 was its worst since 2022, rising only 8.6%.

feed.title: Community Power NH rates exceed Eversource. Leaders see bright side.
feed.summary: The Community Power Coalition of New Hampshire (CPCNH), including Portsmouth Community Power, has announced an increase in its electricity supply rates. Starting February 1, the Granite Basic default rate for residential and small commercial customers will rise to 14.663 cents per kilowatt-hour, up from 13.419 cents. This new rate will exceed Eversource's charges.

feed.title: FedEx to close local plant. See which one.
feed.summary: FedEx is closing its Bloomington, Indiana ship center at 3900 W. Roll Ave on February 28, 2026. This closure is part of the company's "Network 2.0" restructuring, aiming for $1 billion in savings by the end of fiscal year 2026. The number of affected employees is unclear, but the company stated job placement assistance would be offered.

feed.title: The Truth About Consolidated Edison: Boring Utility Stock or Secret Dividend Flex?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Consolidated Edison (ED), portraying it as an underrated utility stock ideal for investors seeking stable dividends and low-drama price moves rather than rapid growth. It highlights the company's defensive nature, consistent dividend payments, and strong base in New York, contrasting it with more "hype" driven stocks. The piece concludes that while not flashy, ED is a solid choice for long-term investors prioritizing balance, stability, and income in their portfolio.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP Stock Holdings Trimmed by Eagle Global Advisors LLC

feed.title: Bulgaria’s new Stryker fleet gets $32M sensor boost from Teledyne FLIR
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR Defense has secured a contract with the U.S. Army, valued up to $32 million, to supply and integrate advanced electro-optical (EO/IR) systems for Bulgaria's Stryker Infantry Carrier Vehicles. This agreement, part of a Foreign Military Sales initiative, aims to modernize Bulgaria's military and enhance its interoperability with NATO forces by replacing Soviet-era vehicles with nearly 200 U.S.-made Strykers. The sensor boost will provide 360-degree visibility, thermal imaging, and long-range threat detection capabilities, with the potential for future integration of unmanned aircraft and chemical detection sensors.

feed.title: GraniteShares 2x Short NVDA Daily ETF
feed.summary: This page provides a detailed profile of the GraniteShares 2x Short NVDA Daily ETF (NVD), including its price, performance, expense ratio, holdings, and various analytical data. It shows that NVD is an inverse U.S. semiconductors ETF launched in August 2023, designed to deliver 2x the inverse daily performance of NVIDIA. The article also provides comparative analysis with similar ETFs in its category and segment.

feed.title: PLDT eyes shutdown of 2G network
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. aims to phase out its 2G network by the end of this year or next, primarily to combat the rise of scams facilitated through the legacy technology. While 2G is prone to fraudulent activities like those using fake base stations, the government and other sectors like banking hesitate to fully decommission it due to its critical role in emergency communication and connectivity in rural areas not yet reached by 4G or 5G. PLDT is collaborating with Huawei on a "triangulation" tool to help law enforcement locate scammers.

feed.title: Barclays Keeps Their Hold Rating on Realty Income (O)
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained a Hold rating on Realty Income (O) with a price target of $64.00, according to analyst Richard Hightower. This aligns with another Hold rating from TipRanks – Anthropic’s Anthropic REIT – Retail, though TipRanks – xAI recently upgraded the stock to a Buy. Realty Income recently reported quarterly revenue of $1.47 billion and a net profit of $315.77 million.
